news.headline: Explosive device kills 13 and injures 38 on bus in Colombia
news.summary:
An explosive device killed 13 people travelling on a bus in southwestern Colombia on Saturday, an attack the country’s army chief described as a “terrorist act” that also left at least 38 injured as violence linked to drug trafficking in the region escalates.

news.headline: Will South Korea or Japan develop a nuclear deterrent of their own?
news.summary:
War on Iran has changed many things, not least of which is the tenor of nuclear debate in two of America’s closest Asian allies: countries that have long defined themselves by the weapons they do not possess.
